name: Unfeeling Flesh
description:  A fighter can make this reaction when targeted by an Attack action, but before the hit rolls are made.  Subtract 1 from the Damage allocated to this fighter from each hit and critical hit from that Attack action, to a minimum of 1.

name: Aura of Dred
description:  A fighter cannot use this ability if he has the Trapper runemark.  Roll a dice. On a 2+, until the end of the battle round, enemies within 3” of this fighter cannot make reactions.

name: Shambling Horde
description:  Use only if this fighter is within 6” of a visible friendly fighter with the Hero runemark.  This warrior may make a bonus Move action equal to the value of this ability.

name: Scrappy Strike
description: Add 1 to the Damage of hits and critical hits caused by this fighter’s next Attack action this activation that targets an enemy that had Damage allocated to them prior to that Attack action.

name: Debilitating Talons
description:  Choose an enemy fighter that was allocated Damage by an Attack action from this fighter this activation.   Until the end of the battle round, treat critical hits caused by that fighter as normal hits instead.

name: Cursed Weapon
description: Until the end of this fighter's activation, Attack actions made by this fighter score critical hits on 5+.

name: Chosen Champion
description:  Use only if this fighter is within 6” of another visible friendly fighter with the Hero runemark.  Until the end of this fighter’s activation, add 3 to Attacks of Attack actions made by this fighter.

name: Sleepless Sentinel
description: Add half the value of this ability (rounded up) to the Move characteristic of this fighter for the next Move action they make this activation.

name: Necrotic Syphon
description:  Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Undead and Minion runemarks within 6" of this fighter.   Allocate Damage equal to the value of this ability to that fighter.   Then, remove a number of Damage from this fighter up to double the value of this ability.

name: Call of Vanhel
description:  Pick a number of visible friendly fighters with the Undead and Minion runemarks equal to half the value of this ability (rounding up) that are each within 3" of this fighter.  Those fighters can each make a bonus Move action of a number of inches equal to the value of this ability.

name: Call the Crimson Feast
description: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by visible friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.

name: Re-Animation
description:  Choose a friendly fighter with the Minion runemark that has been taken down.  Place that fighter anywhere within 3” of this fighter.   If that fighter has the Elite runemark, remove Damage from that fighter equal to the value of this ability.  Otherwise, that fighter has no Damage allocated to it.  That fighter no longer counts as taken down.

name: Vanhel’s Danse Macabre
description:  Pick a number of visible friendly fighters with the Undead and Minion runemarks up to equal to the value of this ability that are each within 9" of this warrior.  Each of these fighters may make a bonus Move action or a bonus Attack action (some can make Move and some can make Attack actions).
